modules.name: APP_LAYOUT
modules.summary: Defines the root HTML layout for the Next.js application with custom fonts.

modules.name: ESLINT_CONFIG
modules.summary: Configures ESLint for Next.js and TypeScript using flat config format.

modules.name: NEXT_CONFIG
modules.summary: Defines Next.js framework configuration options for the application.

modules.name: POSTCSS_CONFIG
modules.summary: Configures PostCSS with Tailwind CSS plugin for styling.

modules.name: APP_PAGE
modules.summary: Renders the main home page with Next.js logo, instructions, and links.

modules.name: REPOMIND_META_SETTINGS
modules.summary: Stores RepoMind bot settings like commit branch and author details.

modules.name: REPOMIND_META_SYNC_STATE
modules.summary: Tracks RepoMind bot's synchronization state, including last processed commit.

modules.name: REPOMIND_META_TICKET_INDEX
modules.summary: Indexes tickets and ADRs managed by the RepoMind bot.

modules.name: REPOMIND_ADRS_ADR_001
modules.summary: Documents the decision to establish an initial architectural baseline for the codebase.

modules.name: REPOMIND_CONFIG
modules.summary: Configures RepoMind bot project details, AI, changelog, and integrations.

modules.name: README
modules.summary: Provides project overview, setup instructions, and deployment guide for Next.js app.

modules.name: TSCONFIG
modules.summary: Configures TypeScript compiler options for a Next.js project, including paths.

modules.name: REPOMIND_ARCHITECTURE_MODULES
modules.summary: Stores RepoMind's architectural map of modules, dependencies, and layers.

modules.name: REPOMIND_ARCHITECTURE_ONBOARDING
modules.summary: Placeholder for project onboarding guide, to be filled by RepoMind.

modules.name: REPOMIND_ARCHITECTURE_TECH_STACK
modules.summary: Defines the project's detected tech stack, languages, frameworks, and services.

modules.name: PACKAGE
modules.summary: Manages project dependencies, scripts, and metadata for a Next.js application.
